title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Manya Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Manya Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Manya Group family as a Curriculum Developer in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Manya Group:
Manya Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manya Group!
